# DroidPDF - Kotlin PDF Library for Android

> DroidPDF is a Kotlin-native PDF library for Android (.aar). It provides PDF generation, editing, merging, splitting, annotations, forms, encryption, and text extraction. It is ISO 32000-1 (PDF 1.7) compliant and designed as an affordable alternative to iText7.

## Key Facts

- Language: Kotlin (Android)
- Min SDK: Android API 26 (Android 8.0)
- License: Free for personal/non-commercial use. Commercial: $99/year (any team size). 7-day free trial.
- PDF Spec: ISO 32000-1 (PDF 1.7)
- Font Support: Standard 14 fonts + TTF/OTF embedding via Apache FontBox

## Features

### PDF Generation
- Create PDFs with text, images (JPEG/PNG/WebP), and tables
- High-level layout API: Document, Paragraph, Table, Image
- Low-level canvas API for direct content stream manipulation
- Custom page sizes (A4, Letter, Legal, A3, A5, custom)
- Font embedding with text measurement

### Page Operations
- Merge multiple PDFs (full or partial page ranges)
- Split PDFs by page range or individual pages
- Rotate pages (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°)
- Reorder, insert, and delete pages

### Annotations (11 types)
- Text (sticky notes), Highlight, Underline, Strikeout
- FreeText, Stamp (Approved/Draft/Confidential/etc.)
- Square, Circle, Line, Ink (freehand), Link (URI/page)

### Forms (AcroForm)
- TextField (single/multiline, max length)
- CheckboxField
- RadioButtonField (groups)
- DropdownField (combo box)

### Security
- AES-128 and AES-256 encryption
- User and owner passwords
- Permission flags: print, copy, modify, annotate, fill

### Text Extraction
- Extract text from all pages or specific pages
- Case-insensitive search with page index results
- FlateDecode stream decompression

## Installation

```kotlin
// settings.gradle.kts - add JitPack repository
dependencyResolutionManagement {
    repositories {
        maven { url = uri("https://jitpack.io") }
    }
}

// build.gradle.kts - add dependency
dependencies {
    implementation("com.github.youichi-uda:droidpdf:v1.0.1")
}
```

## Quick Start

```kotlin
val pdf = PdfDocument(outputStream)
val document = Document(pdf)

document.add(Paragraph("Hello, DroidPDF!").setFontSize(16f))
document.add(Table(3).apply {
    addCell("Name")
    addCell("Age")
    addCell("City")
})
document.close()
```

## Package Structure

- `com.droidpdf.core` — PdfDocument, PdfPage, PdfReader, PdfWriter, TextExtractor
- `com.droidpdf.content` — PdfCanvas, PdfFont, PdfImage
- `com.droidpdf.layout` — Document, Paragraph, Table, Image
- `com.droidpdf.annotations` — All annotation types
- `com.droidpdf.forms` — AcroForm fields
- `com.droidpdf.manipulation` — PdfMerger, PdfSplitter, PageOperations
- `com.droidpdf.security` — PdfEncryption

## Documentation

- Website: https://droidpdf.abyo.net
- Getting Started: https://droidpdf.abyo.net/docs/
- API Reference: https://droidpdf.abyo.net/api/
